message:
fix(fj-trace): reject zero Conv strides at trace-time

Conv shape inference allowed stride=0 in 1D (silently converted to 1
via .max(1)) and 2D (caused div_ceil(0) panic). Add explicit validation
rejecting zero strides with TraceError::ShapeInferenceFailed.

Changes:
- Remove .max(1) workaround in 1D path, add explicit zero check
- Add zero stride check in 2D path before div_ceil calls
- Add 5 regression tests for 1D and 2D zero stride rejection

Fixes: frankenjax-pzj4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
